summary: Plan-mode live PR inventory classification. No shared canonical is present, no security-sensitive signal was detected in hydrated refs, and no close/merge/fix action is safe or allowed from this shard. Each open PR is kept as an independent maintainer-review item.

actions.reason: Distinct contributor PR with supplied proof and no hydrated duplicate/supersession evidence. Keep for maintainer or author follow-up outside this close-only inventory shard.
Focused open PR with no hydrated duplicate, superseding PR, security signal, or low-signal evidence. Keep independently for maintainer review.
Distinct contributor PR with supplied proof and no safe close or merge path in plan mode. Keep independently for author/maintainer follow-up.
Focused open PR with no hydrated duplicate, supersession, or security signal. Keep independently for maintainer technical review.
Small focused open PR with supplied proof and no closeout basis. Merge/fix actions are blocked by job frontmatter, so keep independently for maintainer review.
